title: Nuke Bay Balance pack-Less Drop type weapons per ship
description: Datapack for balancing using the Nuclear Bomb Bay Addon/Mod
body:
This datapack is meant to balance the amount of bombs that can be dropped by each plane.

Built-in Immersive Aircraft and Man of Many Planes support.

**DISCLAIMER:**

Due to how the weapon placing system works in Immersive Aircraft, the changes made also apply to the default Bomb Bay, and any weapons with the "DROP" weapon type.

 

Changes made:

(Immersive Aircraft)

Airship, Biplane, Gyrodyne: Changed amount of drop type weapons from 2 to 1.

Warship: Changed to 1 drop type weapon per Weapon slot. (Max 2 weapons if both slots are used)

(Man of Many Planes)

Scarlet Biplane: Changed to 1 drop type weapon per Weapon slot. (Max 2 weapons if both slots are used)
